case_title: THE NATIONA COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. VS. JOHNATHEN BOUGH ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION OF PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY, INC. MASTER CALENDAR COURT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Set For Trial On Feb-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Order For Deemed Admissions; Fees And Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Fred Keeperman, Esq., Tel. 925.631.7710, appearing for the Plaintiff.
Johnathen Bough, Tel. 415.239.4774, Defendant and Self-Represented Litigant, appearing.

No argument held. Ruling: the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: the unopposed Motion of Plaintiff The National Collection Agency, Inc. for Order For Deemed Admissions is GRANTED. The request for sanctions in the amount of $525.00 is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not Reported. (302)
